description: Vendor dashboard for product management with role-based access
acceptance_criteria: Log in with vendor credentials from seed data (role='vendor').
Verify 'Add Product' button is visible with data-testid='add-product-btn'.
Verify vendor can view only their own products in product list with data-testid='vendor-product-list'.
Log out and log in as customer, verify access to /vendor/dashboard returns 403 or redirects.
Verify vendor can edit their product: locate edit button with data-testid='edit-product'.
Verify vendor can delete their product: locate delete button with data-testid='delete-product'.
Verify changes persist after page refresh.
Verify admin user can access vendor dashboard but cannot modify vendor products they don't own.
Verify API endpoints enforce role-based access (customer API call to vendor endpoint returns 403).
